reason: Frontend layer spec index — entry point for type/service/hook conventions touched by this task.
Repository-Owned Trellis Execution Metadata contract (§3) is the spec this task evolves from repo-level to project-level.
Type contracts for new Project / Repository fields and the narrowed SddMode enum without unsafe casts.
Persistence and reducer patterns for project/repo state updates after schema migration.
Tauri layer spec for SQLite migrations, Rust command shape, and IPC boundary validation.
Cross-layer data flow from SQLite migration → StoredProject → Project type → service wrapper → hook consumer.
Apply existing migration / command / serde-default patterns instead of inventing new ones.
